metadata.title: Tartupak — Cardboard Packaging Manufacturer in Estonia
metadata.description: Custom corrugated cardboard packaging for logistics, food production and industry.

footer.tagline: Estonian corrugated cardboard packaging manufacturer since 2001. Modern production lines and sustainable industrial solutions.

hero.title: We create *packaging* that protects.
hero.subtitle: Premium corrugated cardboard solutions engineered for industrial reliability. We combine Scandinavian minimalism with 20+ years of manufacturing expertise.

bespoke.title: Packaging built to your exact specs
bespoke.description: Every product is unique, and its packaging should be too. From specialist electronics to delicate retail displays, we engineer solutions that balance protection with presentation.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Rigorous checks on strength and finish

cta.title: Ready to pack *smarter?*
cta.description: Consult with our specialists for a tailored quote that fits your technical requirements and budget.

products.title: Premium Packaging Solutions
products.metaDescription: Corrugated cardboard packaging for logistics, food production, industry and retail — seven product categories from Tartupak.
products.requestQuoteForProduct: Request a Quote for This Product

recyclable.title: 100% Recyclable
recyclable.description: Sourced from sustainably managed European forests

protection.title: Premium Protection
protection.description: Engineered structural integrity for industrial transport

sizing.title: Custom Sizing
sizing.description: Available in standard FEFCO codes or bespoke dimensions

lainepapp.title: Corrugated Cardboard
lainepapp.description: The foundation of all our packaging. We produce and supply corrugated cardboard in various flute profiles and wall configurations — single wall, double wall, and triple wall. Suitable for manufacturing, retail, and logistics.
lainepapp.applications: Packaging manufacturing, raw material supply, custom box production, retail and logistics

transpordipakend.title: Transport Packaging
transpordipakend.description: Robust corrugated cardboard transport boxes designed for heavy-duty shipping and storage. Built to withstand the rigors of logistics while keeping contents pristine. Available in standard and custom dimensions from 1 piece.
transpordipakend.applications: Logistics and freight, warehousing, e-commerce shipping, industrial goods transport

fleksotrukk.title: Flexo Print Packaging
fleksotrukk.description: High-quality flexographic printing on corrugated cardboard. Up to 4 colors for vivid retail presence and brand recognition. Ideal for companies that want packaging to communicate their brand as well as protect their product.
fleksotrukk.applications: Retail packaging, brand packaging, product presentation boxes, promotional packaging

kulmutatud-toodete-pakend.title: Frozen Product Packaging
kulmutatud-toodete-pakend.description: Moisture-resistant corrugated cardboard packaging specifically engineered for frozen and refrigerated products. Maintains structural integrity at low temperatures. Suitable for cold storage logistics and frozen food production.
kulmutatud-toodete-pakend.applications: Frozen food production, cold storage logistics, refrigerated goods transport, food industry

pizzakarbid.title: Pizza Boxes
pizzakarbid.description: Food-safe corrugated cardboard pizza boxes for restaurants and delivery services. Ventilated and grease-resistant to keep food fresh and hot. Available in standard sizes and custom dimensions with optional flexo print branding.
pizzakarbid.applications: Pizzerias and restaurants, food delivery services, takeaway food packaging, catering

erilise-kujuga-pakendid.title: Custom Shape Packaging
erilise-kujuga-pakendid.description: Bespoke packaging developed specifically for your product's dimensions, shape and transportation conditions. Our CAD designers engineer die-cut solutions that balance protection with presentation. From fragile electronics to industrial components.
erilise-kujuga-pakendid.applications: Electronics and tech products, fragile or irregularly shaped items, industrial components, premium retail presentation

suuregabariidilised-pakendid.title: Large Format Packaging
suuregabariidilised-pakendid.description: Heavy-duty corrugated cardboard packaging for large or heavy goods. Engineered for oversized industrial products, furniture, appliances, and pallet transport. Built to handle substantial weight and volume without compromising structural integrity.
suuregabariidilised-pakendid.applications: Industrial equipment, furniture and appliances, pallet transport, construction materials

fefco.title: FEFCO Catalog
fefco.subtitle: International standard for corrugated packaging designs.

0201.title: Regular slotted container (RSC)
0201.description: The most widely used packaging format in the world. Top and bottom flaps meet in the center when closed. Simple, cost-effective, ideal for most shipping needs.
0201.usage: General logistics, e-commerce, warehousing, food industry

0427.title: Folder-type box
0427.description: A self-locking box that requires no tape for assembly. Perfect for premium presentation and fast packing lines.
0427.usage: Subscription boxes, product presentation, high-end shipping, retail

0203.title: Fully overlapping slotted container (FOL)
0203.description: Outer flaps fully overlap, providing extra edge protection and stacking strength. Excellent for heavy goods.
0203.usage: Heavy goods, industrial transport, stacking applications

0300.title: Full telescope box
0300.description: Consists of separate top and bottom parts that fit over each other. Provides excellent protection for the product.

0711.title: Ready-glued case
0711.description: Quick assembly with pre-glued bottom. Ideal for fast-paced fulfillment lines and high-volume operations.
0711.usage: E-commerce fulfillment, fast assembly lines, high volume shipping

0421.title: Die-cut folder
0421.description: Precision die-cut design for sleek retail-ready presentation. No tape or glue required for assembly.

about.title: About
about.intro: Tartupak is an Estonian manufacturer of corrugated cardboard packaging.
about.body: The company develops packaging solutions for logistics, food production, ecommerce and industrial companies. Our specialists help customers design packaging that protects products during storage and transportation while remaining cost-efficient and environmentally responsible.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your packaging requirements.
contact.address: Tamme 35, Tõrvandi, Ülenurme vald, 61715 Tartumaa, Estonia

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: This page describes how Tartupak processes personal data from website visitors and inquiry submissions.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.body: Terms for using this website. Full terms will be finalized before publication.
